description.ko: 음파가 가상 공간 내에서 복잡한 빛의 패턴과 건축학적인 유체 형태로 나타나는 정교한 디지털 음향 주파수 해석입니다.
description.en: A sophisticated digital interpretation of acoustic frequencies, where sound waves manifest as intricate light patterns and architectural fluid forms within a virtual space.

prompt: ECHO-0 style, abstract sound visualization, pulsating audio waves transformed into 3D geometric structures, cymatic patterns, glowing neon fluid dynamics, iridescent light particles suspended in a dark void, cinematic motion blur, high-tech aesthetic, 8k resolution, vibrant frequency spectrum.
